remaining_params.SpellDescription: Choose target creature with a counter on it. When that creature dies this turn, return that card to its owner's hand.
remaining_params.StackDescription: When {c:Targeted} dies this turn, return that card to its owner's hand.
remaining_params.TgtPrompt: Choose target creature with a counter on it

params.TriggerDescription: When CARDNAME enters, support 2. (Put a +1/+1 counter on each of up to two other target creatures.)
